# NameBlooms

> Baby Name Meanings, Origins & Popularity

Discover the perfect baby name. Explore 6,000+ names with meanings, origins, popularity trends since 1880, and side-by-side comparisons.

## Core pages
- [Methodology and data sources](https://nameblooms.com/methodology/): how every figure is derived, with primary-source citations
- [Compare](https://nameblooms.com/compare/): side-by-side comparison
- [About and editorial standards](https://nameblooms.com/about/): authorship and review policy

## Key name
- [Boy](https://nameblooms.com/names/gender/boy/)
- [Girl](https://nameblooms.com/names/gender/girl/)
- [A](https://nameblooms.com/names/letter/a/)
- [B](https://nameblooms.com/names/letter/b/)
- [C](https://nameblooms.com/names/letter/c/)
- [D](https://nameblooms.com/names/letter/d/)
- [E](https://nameblooms.com/names/letter/e/)
- [F](https://nameblooms.com/names/letter/f/)
- [G](https://nameblooms.com/names/letter/g/)
- [H](https://nameblooms.com/names/letter/h/)
- [I](https://nameblooms.com/names/letter/i/)
- [J](https://nameblooms.com/names/letter/j/)

## Data
- Primary sources: U.S. Social Security Administration, U.S. Census Bureau, Behind the Name, Wikimedia Foundation
- All figures are derived from these primary sources; see /methodology/ for derivation and vintage.
